Notes: Katy Freeman of UMD named Wildwood Lodge Tournament MVP
Katie Winkelman of UMD, Jamie Jones of CSP, Allison Swenson and Katie Walden
of MSUM also named to all-tournament team. Three 2nd half foul outs: UMD's
Justine Axtell at 1:49, CSP's Jamie Jones at :25, CSP's Katie LaViolette :05
